description_long: This church is a large, rectangular building with a symmetrical facade featuring two prominent towers flanking the main entrance. The exterior walls are finished in a light, cream-colored material, and the roof is covered with reddish-brown tiles arranged in a pitched style. Decorative architectural elements such as arched windows, pilasters, and cornices are visible, giving the structure a classical and somewhat colonial appearance. The main entrance is accentuated by a set of stairs and ornate doors, while the side elevations display a series of tall, narrow windows and additional entryways. The church is surrounded by a paved area with several palm trees and parked vehicles, suggesting an urban or suburban setting. The overall design is stately and inviting, with clear attention to symmetry and detail.
description: A stately, cream-colored church with twin towers, arched windows, and a red-tiled roof, surrounded by palm trees and urban pavement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, twin towers, and steps leading up to ornate doors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long row of arched windows, side entrance, and adjacent palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the church, roof structure, and minimal decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the side entrance, windows, and landscaping with palm trees.
